title: Eva: 'Daddy play TAG!'
prompt: Mid-shot at @playground-park — soft mulch ground in foreground, green grass + playground equipment softly visible BACKGROUND. @Sara already CENTER-LEFT standing on the mulch with both feet planted, ponytail with bow, both hands cupped softly beside her mouth in a 'calling out' gesture, beaming with cheerful playful kid energy. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible. @Eva already CENTER-RIGHT standing on the mulch right next to Sara with both feet planted, curly blonde hair with rainbow bow, both arms held out wide in an excited welcoming gesture, beaming brightly. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Eva bounces softly in place, both feet still planted, calling out cheerfully toward off-screen Papa. Eva (cheerful sing-song call to off-screen Papa): "Daddy! Daddy let's play TAG!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Sara turns toward Eva with a delighted grin, both hands still cupped at her mouth. Sara (cheerful kid-voice, sing-song): "You can't catch us, Daddy!" Both girls giggle softly together, still grounded with feet on the mulch. Calm cheerful warm kid-show family ambiance throughout. STRICT ANATOMY: Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both cupped at mouth. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times — both held out wide. Both girls stay grounded with both feet on the mulch throughout — no leaping, no jumping, no running off. The mulch and playground stay plain clean — no marks, no red, no debris.
